ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Franke appeared by zoom for Krisanne Jordan (Administrator).

Mr. Franke provided history, and explained circumstances and services provided to support the statutory fee request. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
